overview.zh: 新加坡是位于东南亚马来半岛南端的城市国家，扼守马六甲海峡要冲，是世界重要的国际金融、航运与贸易中心。社会多元，华人、马来人、印度人等族群和谐共处，经济高度发达。
overview.en: Singapore is a city-state at the southern tip of the Malay Peninsula in Southeast Asia, commanding the strategic Strait of Malacca and serving as a major global hub for finance, shipping and trade. It is a highly multicultural society where Chinese, Malay, Indian and other communities live together, with a highly developed economy.

capitalHistory.zh: 新加坡是城市国家，全国即为首都。1819年成为自由贸易港后迅速崛起，1965年独立建国，发展为现代化都市。
capitalHistory.en: As a city-state, Singapore is itself the capital. It rose rapidly after becoming a free port in 1819 and, following independence in 1965, developed into a modern metropolis.

climate.zh: 地处赤道附近，属热带雨林气候，全年高温多雨、湿度较大。
climate.en: Located near the equator, Singapore has a tropical rainforest climate with high temperatures, abundant rainfall and high humidity throughout the year.

note.zh: 由祖比尔·赛义德以马来语创作，1965年独立时定为国歌。
note.en: Composed in Malay by Zubir Said; adopted as the national anthem at independence in 1965.

name.zh: 卓锦·万代兰（胡姬花,国花）
狮子（'狮城'象征,见于鱼尾狮）
name.en: Lion (symbol of the 'Lion City', echoed by the Merlion)

note.zh: 男足曾多次夺得东南亚地区赛事冠军，尚未打进世界杯正赛。
note.en: The men's team has won several Southeast Asian regional titles but has yet to qualify for the World Cup.

colorNotes.zh: 红色与白色为国旗色，象征团结、平等与纯洁，节庆中广泛使用。
colorNotes.en: Red and white, the flag colors, symbolize unity, equality and purity, and are widely used in celebrations.

colorNotes.zh: 红色也契合华人文化的喜庆寓意，适合节庆营销。
colorNotes.en: Red also aligns with festive connotations in Chinese culture, fitting for celebratory marketing.

culturalTaboos.zh: 官方语言有英语、华语、马来语和泰米尔语，重要内容宜提供多语版本。
culturalTaboos.en: Official languages are English, Mandarin, Malay and Tamil; key content should offer multilingual versions.

culturalTaboos.zh: 社会对多元宗教与族群十分敏感,内容需避免冒犯任一群体。
culturalTaboos.en: Society is sensitive about its religious and ethnic diversity; content must avoid offending any group.

formatting.zh: 英语为主要行政与商务语言，拼写偏英式；日期常用 日/月/年。
formatting.en: English is the main administrative and business language with British-leaning spelling; dates commonly use DD/MM/YYYY.

formatting.zh: 货币为新加坡元（符号 S$），采用公制单位。
formatting.en: The currency is the Singapore dollar (symbol S$), and metric units are used.

funFacts.zh: 新加坡被誉为'花园城市',城市绿化覆盖率在全球名列前茅。
funFacts.en: Singapore is known as a 'Garden City', with one of the world's highest rates of urban greenery.

funFacts.zh: 新加坡植物园是该国唯一的世界文化遗产,也是首个入选的热带植物园。
funFacts.en: The Singapore Botanic Gardens is the country's only World Heritage Site and the first tropical botanic garden to be listed.

label.zh: 联合国教科文组织世界遗产名录
